messages.content:
You are an AI assistant that completes tasks by reasoning and using tools.

## Think Before Acting

Before making tool calls, briefly explain your reasoning in 1-3 sentences:
- What you learned from the previous step
- What you're doing next and why

Don't over-explain. Be concise but show your thinking.

## Tools

**Always Available (Meta-Tools):**
- `todo_write` - Task planning: create/update todos. Takes `todos` array [{id, content, status}] and `merge` boolean.
- `toolbelt_list_tools` / `toolbelt_inspect_tool` / `toolbelt_add_tool` / `toolbelt_remove_tool` - Tool management
- `final_answer` - Submit your answer (status: completed/blocked/failed)

**Domain Tools:** Use `toolbelt_list_tools` to discover, then `toolbelt_add_tool` to add them.

## Workflow

1. Plan: Use `todo_write` to create todos for complex tasks
2. Discover: Use `toolbelt_list_tools` to find relevant tools
3. Execute: Work through todos, use `todo_write` with `merge=true` to update status
4. Complete: Call `final_answer` (all todos must be completed/cancelled first)

## Rules

- Update todo status with `todo_write`: set `in_progress` when starting, `completed` when done
- Show your work for calculations
- `final_answer` is rejected if todos are incomplete

We are conducting a compliance review of Magnolia Gardens' General Resident Agreement. We are currently determining whether the General Resident Agreement is in compliance with Kentucky Law. Please review the General Resident Agreement and determine if it is in compliance with Kentucky Revised Statutes (KRS) section 194A.713(8). Please provide a short paragraph in reply to me right here, explaining your reasoning.

messages.content: {"name": "filesystem_server_search_files", "description": "Search for files matching a glob pattern in the given directory. Uses glob syntax (not regex): * matches any chars, ? matches one char.", "parameters": {"properties": {"pattern": {"description": "Glob pattern to match filenames (not full paths). Uses shell-style wildcards: '*' matches any characters, '?' matches single character, '[seq]' matches any character in seq. Does NOT support '**' for recursive directory matching (use 'recursive' parameter instead). Examples: '*.json' (all JSON files), 'report_*.csv' (CSV files starting with 'report_'), 'data_?.txt' (data_1.txt, data_a.txt, etc.). Returns a string with format: 'Found N file(s) matching 'pattern':\\n' followed by newline-separated absolute paths within the sandbox. If no matches: 'No files matching 'pattern' found in path'. Error cases return bracketed messages: '[not found: path]', '[access denied: path]', '[not a directory: path]', '[permission denied: path]'.", "type": "string"}, "path": {"description": "(Optional) Directory path within the sandbox to search in. Must start with '/'. Default: '/' (sandbox root). Example: '/documents' or '/data/exports'", "type": "string", "nullable": true}, "recursive": {"description": "(Optional) Search recursively through all subdirectories. Default: true. Note: Symlinks pointing outside the sandbox are skipped for security.", "type": "boolean", "nullable": true}, "max_results": {"description": "(Optional) Maximum number of matching files to return. Default: 100. Set to 0 for unlimited results. When the limit is reached, results are truncated and a '(Results limited to N)' message is appended.", "type": "integer", "nullable": true}}, "required": ["pattern"], "type": "object", "additionalProperties": false}}
messages.name: toolbelt_inspect_tool

messages.content:
{"name": "docs_server_docs", "description": "Manage .docx documents: create, read, edit text/images, format, headers/footers, margins.

Actions: help | create | delete | overview | read_content | read_image |
         add_text | edit_text | delete_text | add_image | modify_image |
         format | header_footer | page_margins | page_orientation | comments

Workflow: read_content to get identifiers (e.g., 'body.p.0') -> use them for edits.
Paths must start with '/' and end with '.docx' (e.g., '/docs/report.docx').
Call action='help' for full parameter details.", "parameters": {"additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"request": {"description": "Input for docs meta-tool.", "properties": {"action": {"description": "Action to perform", "enum": ["help", "create", "delete", "overview", "read_content", "read_image", "add_text", "edit_text", "delete_text", "add_image", "modify_image", "format", "header_footer", "page_margins", "page_orientation", "comments"], "type": "string"}, "file_path": {"description": "(Optional) Full file path. REQUIRED for file operations. Must start with '/' and end with '.docx'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "directory": {"description": "(Optional) Directory for 'create' (e.g., '/'). Must be provided for 'create' action. Must start with '/'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "file_name": {"description": "(Optional) File name for 'create' (e.g., 'report.docx'). Must be provided for 'create' action. Must end with '.docx' and not contain '/'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "content": {"description": "(Optional) Content blocks for actions that populate document content ('create', 'header_footer'). Must be provided for 'create' action. REQUIRED when hf_action='set' for 'header_footer' action. Each block needs a 'type' field. Types: paragraph ({type: 'paragraph', text: 'Your text'}), heading ({type: 'heading', text: 'Title', level: 1}), bullet_list ({type: 'bullet_list', items: ['A', 'B']}), numbered_list ({type: 'numbered_list', items: ['1st', '2nd']}), table ({type: 'table', rows: [['H1', 'H2'], ['C1', 'C2']], header: true}), page_break ({type: 'page_break'}), section_break ({type: 'section_break'}). Note: 'text' fields must not be empty; 'items' lists must not be empty. For 'header_footer' action only: 'page_break' and 'section_break' blocks are not supported; 'table' blocks require a 'width' field (in inches). Example: [{type: 'heading', text: 'My Doc', level: 1}, {type: 'paragraph', text: 'Hello'}]", "items": {"properties": {}, "type": "object"}, "nullable": true, "type": "array"}, "metadata": {"description": "(Optional) Document metadata for 'create': {title?, author?, ...}", "nullable": true, "properties": {}, "type": "object"}, "identifier": {"description": "(Optional) Obtained from read_document_content output. Target element identifier. Must be provided for 'add_text', 'edit_text', 'delete_text', 'add_image', 'format', and comments 'add' actions. Format depends on action: For text operations (add_text, edit_text, delete_text): paragraph ID (e.g., 'body.p.3'), run ID (e.g., 'body.p.3.r.1'), or cell ID (e.g., 'body.tbl.1.row.2.cell.3.p.0'). For add_image: paragraph ID or run ID. For format: run, paragraph, or cell ID. For comments 'add': run, paragraph, or cell ID to attach comment to.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "text": {"description": "(Optional) Text content for add_text", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "new_text": {"description": "(Optional) Replacement text for edit_text", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "position": {"description": "(Optional) Position for add_text/add_image: 'start' or 'end'. 'before' and 'after' are accepted as aliases for 'start' and 'end'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "scope": {"description": "(Optional) Scope for delete_text: 'content' or 'element'. Note: 'element' scope is not supported for cell identifiers; use 'content' to clear cell contents.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "collapse_whitespace": {"description": "(Optional) Collapse whitespace for delete_text in cells", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "page_index": {"description": "(Optional) For read_content only: 0-based page for reading large docs in chunks. page_index=0 is paragraphs 0-49, page_index=1 is 50-99, etc. Omit to read entire document.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "section_index": {"description": "(Optional) For page_margins, page_orientation, header_footer only: 0-based Word page-layout section index. Default 0. NOT for read_content pagination (use page_index instead).", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "annotation": {"description": "(Optional) Image annotation key for read_image. Obtained from read_content output. Format: 'body_p_N_rM' where N is paragraph index and M is run index. Example: 'body_p_0_r0' for first image in first paragraph. The '@' prefix sometimes seen in read_content output is optional and will be stripped.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "image_path": {"description": "(Optional) Path to image file for add_image. Must be provided for 'add_image' action. Must start with '/'. Supported formats: .jpg, .jpeg, .png.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "image_index": {"description": "(Optional) 0-based image index for modify_image. Obtain from read_document_content output which lists images with their indices.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "operation": {"description": "(Optional) Operation for modify_image: rotate, flip, brightness, contrast", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "rotation": {"description": "(Optional) Rotation angle in degrees. Valid range: 0-360. Must be provided for 'modify_image' when operation is 'rotate'.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "flip": {"description": "(Optional) Flip direction: 'horizontal' or 'vertical'. Must be provided for 'modify_image' when operation is 'flip'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "brightness": {"description": "(Optional) Brightness factor. Must be positive (e.g., 0.5=darker, 1.0=unchanged, 2.0=brighter). Must be provided for 'modify_image' when operation is 'brightness'.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "contrast": {"description": "(Optional) Contrast factor. Must be positive (e.g., 0.5=less contrast, 1.0=unchanged, 2.0=more contrast). Must be provided for 'modify_image' when operation is 'contrast'.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "width": {"description": "(Optional) Width in inches. Optional for add_image.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "height": {"description": "(Optional) Height in inches. Optional for add_image.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "bold": {"description": "(Optional) True to enable, False to disable, null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "italic": {"description": "(Optional) True to enable, False to disable, null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "underline": {"description": "(Optional) True to enable, False to disable, null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "strikethrough": {"description": "(Optional) True to enable, False to disable, null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "font_size": {"description": "(Optional) Font size in points (e.g., 12, 14, 24). Null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "font_color": {"description": "(Optional) Hex color code (e.g., 'FF0000' for red, '0000FF' for blue). Null/omit to leave unchanged. For 'format' action, at least one formatting parameter must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "hf_action": {"description": "(Optional) Header/footer action: 'read', 'set', 'clear', or 'link'", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "area": {"description": "(Optional) Header/footer area: 'header' or 'footer'", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "link_to_previous": {"description": "(Optional) For 'link' hf_action: True to link, False to unlink. Note: Section 0 cannot be linked to a previous section.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "pm_action": {"description": "(Optional) Page margins action: 'read' or 'set'", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "margin_top": {"description": "(Optional) Top margin in inches. Must be non-negative. For 'page_margins' set action, at least one margin must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "margin_bottom": {"description": "(Optional) Bottom margin in inches. Must be non-negative. For 'page_margins' set action, at least one margin must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "margin_left": {"description": "(Optional) Left margin in inches. Must be non-negative. For 'page_margins' set action, at least one margin must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "margin_right": {"description": "(Optional) Right margin in inches. Must be non-negative. For 'page_margins' set action, at least one margin must be provided.", "nullable": true, "type": "number"}, "po_action": {"description": "(Optional) Page orientation action: 'read' or 'set'", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "orientation": {"description": "(Optional) Page orientation: 'portrait' or 'landscape'. Must be provided for 'page_orientation' with po_action='set'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "comments_action": {"description": "(Optional) Comments action: 'read', 'add', or 'delete'. For 'add': requires identifier and comment_text. For 'delete': requires comment_id.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "comment_text": {"description": "(Optional) Comment text for 'add' action. Must not be empty.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "comment_author": {"description": "(Optional) Comment author for 'add' action", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "comment_id": {"description": "(Optional) Comment ID for 'delete' action. Must be an existing comment ID from 'read' action output.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}}, "required": ["action"], "type": "object"}}, "required": ["request"], "type": "object"}}

messages.content: {"name": "filesystem_server_list_files", "description": "List files and folders in a path; each entry shows name and type (file/folder). Use to browse a directory.", "parameters": {"properties": {"path": {"description": "(Optional) Absolute path within the sandbox filesystem to list. Must start with '/'. This is NOT a system path - '/' refers to the sandbox root. Default: '/' (sandbox root). Example: '/documents' or '/data/uploads'. Returns a newline-separated string where each line describes one entry: \"'name' (folder)\\n\" for directories, \"'name' (mime/type file) N bytes\\n\" for files. MIME type is guessed from extension ('unknown' if undetectable). Returns '[not found: path]', '[permission denied: path]', or '[not a directory: path]' for errors. Returns 'No items found' for empty directories.", "type": "string", "nullable": true}}, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": false}}
messages.name: toolbelt_inspect_tool

Uses shell-style wildcards: '*' matches any characters, '?' matches single character, '[seq]' matches any character in seq. Does NOT support '**' for recursive directory matching (use 'recursive' parameter instead). Examples: '*.json' (all JSON files), 'report_*.csv' (CSV files starting with 'report_'), 'data_?.txt' (data_1.txt, data_a.txt, etc.). Returns a string with format: 'Found N file(s) matching 'pattern':\\n' followed by newline-separated absolute paths within the sandbox. If no matches: 'No files matching 'pattern' found in path'. Error cases return bracketed messages: '[not found: path]', '[access denied: path]', '[not a directory: path]', '[permission denied: path]'.", "type": "string"}, "path": {"description": "(Optional) Directory path within the sandbox to search in. Must start with '/'. Default: '/' (sandbox root). Example: '/documents' or '/data/exports'", "type": "string", "nullable": true}, "recursive": {"description": "(Optional) Search recursively through all subdirectories. Default: true. Note: Symlinks pointing outside the sandbox are skipped for security.", "type": "boolean", "nullable": true}, "max_results": {"description": "(Optional) Maximum number of matching files to return. Default: 100. Set to 0 for unlimited results. When the limit is reached, results are truncated and a '(Results limited to N)' message is appended.", "type": "integer", "nullable": true}}, "required": ["pattern"], "type": "object", "additionalProperties": false}}

messages.content:
{"name": "pdf_server_pdf", "description": "Manage PDFs: create, read pages/images, search text, render pages as images.

Actions: help | create | read_pages | read_image | page_as_image | search

Paths must start with '/' (e.g., '/reports/annual.pdf').
Call action='help' for full parameter details.", "parameters": {"additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"request": {"description": "Input for pdf meta-tool.", "properties": {"action": {"description": "Action to perform. Required. Valid values: 'help' (list actions), 'create' (create PDF), 'read_pages' (extract text/images), 'read_image' (get extracted image), 'page_as_image' (render page), 'search' (find text).", "enum": ["help", "create", "read_pages", "read_image", "page_as_image", "search"], "type": "string"}, "file_path": {"description": "(Optional) Absolute path to PDF file. REQUIRED for read_pages, read_image, page_as_image, search.

Path MUST start with '/' and MUST end with '.pdf'.

Files are at root, e.g., '/report.pdf', '/data.pdf'.

WRONG paths (will fail):
- 'report.pdf' (missing leading /)
- '/tmp/report.pdf' (/tmp doesn't exist)
- '/mnt/data/report.pdf' (OpenAI sandbox path - not supported)
- 'https://example.com/file.pdf' (URLs not supported - use filesystem paths)
- '/report' (missing .pdf extension)

CORRECT: '/report.pdf', '/my_file.pdf'", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "directory": {"description": "(Optional) Directory path for 'create' action. Must start with '/'. Use '/' for root directory, '/reports' for subdirectory. Required for 'create' action. Directory is created if it doesn't exist.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "file_name": {"description": "(Optional) File name for 'create' action. Must end with '.pdf' and cannot contain '/'. Example: 'report.pdf', 'annual_2024.pdf'. Required for 'create' action.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "content": {"description": "(Optional) Content blocks for 'create' action. List of dicts, each with a 'type' field. Block types and their fields:
- 'paragraph': REQUIRED: text (non-empty str). Optional: bold (bool), italic (bool).
- 'heading': REQUIRED: text (non-empty str). Optional: level (int, 1-3, default 1).
- 'bullet_list': REQUIRED: items (non-empty list[str], each item non-empty).
- 'numbered_list': REQUIRED: items (non-empty list[str], each item non-empty).
- 'table': REQUIRED: rows (non-empty list[list[str]], at least one row). Optional: header (bool, default true — first row is header).
- 'page_break': No additional fields.
- 'spacer': Optional: height (float, points, default 12).", "items": {"properties": {}, "type": "object"}, "nullable": true, "type": "array"}, "metadata": {"description": "(Optional) PDF metadata for 'create' action. Optional dictionary with keys: 'title' (str), 'subject' (str), 'author' (str). Example: {'title': 'Q4 Report', 'author': 'Finance'}.", "nullable": true, "properties": {}, "type": "object"}, "page_size": {"description": "(Optional) Page size for 'create' action. Valid values: 'letter' (8.5x11 in, default) or 'a4' (210x297 mm). Case-insensitive.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "pages": {"description": "(Optional) Page numbers to read for 'read_pages' action. List of 1-indexed integers (e.g., [1, 3, 5]). None or omitted to read all pages.", "items": {"type": "integer"}, "nullable": true, "type": "array"}, "page_number": {"description": "(Optional) Page number for 'page_as_image' action. 1-indexed integer (1 for first page). Must be within document page count. Required for 'page_as_image'.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "annotation": {"description": "(Optional) Image annotation key for 'read_image' action. Format: 'page{N}_img{M}' as returned by read_pages (e.g., 'page1_img0'). Leading '@' is auto-stripped. Required for 'read_image'.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "query": {"description": "(Optional) Search query string for 'search' action. Must be a non-empty string. Plain text to find in PDF content. Required for 'search' action.", "nullable": true, "type": "string"}, "case_sensitive": {"description": "(Optional) Case-sensitive matching for 'search' action. Default: false (case-insensitive).", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "whole_word": {"description": "(Optional) Match whole words only for 'search' action. Uses word boundaries. Default: false.", "nullable": true, "type": "boolean"}, "max_results": {"description": "(Optional) Maximum matches to return for 'search' action. Default: 100.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}, "context_chars": {"description": "(Optional) Characters of context around each match for 'search' action. Default: 50.", "nullable": true, "type": "integer"}}, "required": ["action"], "type": "object"}}, "required": ["request"], "type": "object"}}
messages.name: toolbelt_inspect_tool

[body.p.0]: ASSISTED LIVING RESIDENT AGREEMENT 
  Runs: [body.p.0.r.0]: "ASSISTED LIVING RESIDENT AGREEMENT"(bold,underline) | [body.p.0.r.1]: " "(bold)

[body.p.1]: You are strongly encourage to have your attorney or other representative review this agreement before  you sign. ____________________ is permitted by zoning and the fire Marshal to have ___ total  residents; we are licensed to have _____ Assisted Living residents. This month to month lease is for  Assisted Living residents only. All independent living residents shall not be a part of the assisted living  program and will not receive care by assisted living program aids and employees. Per state  requirements all Independent living residents shall be assessed by the delegating nurse to assure that  an assisted living level of care is not needed and that the resident is qualified for Independent living;  this assessment will cost $____.  
  Runs: [body.p.1.r.0]: "You are strongly "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.1]: "encourage"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.2]: " to have your attorney or other representative review this agreement before  you "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.3]: "sign"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.4]: ". ____________________ is permitted by zoning and the fire Marshal to have ___ total  residents; we are licensed to "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.5]: "have __"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.6]: "___ Assisted Living residents. This month to month lease is for  Assisted Living residents only. All independent living residents shall "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.7]: "n"(bold,italic) | [body.p.1.r.8]: "ot "(bold,italic,underline) | [body.p.1.r.9]: "be a part of the assisted living  program and will not receive care "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.10]: "by"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.11]: " assisted living program aids and employees. Per state  requirements all "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.12]: "Independent"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.13]: " living residents shall be assessed by the delegating nurse to assure that  an assisted living level of care is not needed and that the resident is qualified for "(italic) | [body.p.1.r.14]: "Independent"(italic) | [body.p.1.r.15]: " living;  this assessment will cost $____.  "(italic)

[body.p.2]: PARTIES 
  Runs: [body.p.2.r.0]: "PARTIES "(bold)

[body.p.3]: 1. This agreement is between (company)__________________________ and________________________________________ (Residents Name) 

[body.p.4]: Your residency at _______________________________ begins  

[body.p.5]: on____________________. After this agreement is signed this agreement will at such  time become valid and in effect and with the understanding that the charges of all  required fees for the current month is to be collected by ____________________. 

[body.p.6]: LEVEL OF CARE 
  Runs: [body.p.6.r.0]: "LEVEL OF CARE "(bold)

[body.p.7]: 2. This facility is licensed to provide low, moderate, and high levels of care. 

[body.p.8]: 3.Based on the information provided by your doctor and an assessment performed by  this facility, you require ______ level of care. if your care needs change and you need a  higher level of care, which this facility is not licensed to provide, we may request a level  of care waiver from the Department in order for you to remain here. if the waiver  request is not granted, we will give you ample time notice that you will be discharged,  and will assist you in finding an appropriate facility. 

[body.p.9]: FEES 
  Runs: [body.p.9.r.0]: "FEES "(bold)

[body.p.10]: 4.The monthly fee for your care at this facility is $_______________ with an entry fee  of $________________. This monthly fee includes the services listed below. This fee  does not include medications, personal phone line/long distance calls, medical  equipment, outside entertainment or trips, purchasing of clothing, adult day care,  barbering, hair styling, manicuring, burial and funeral expenses and arrangements.

[body.p.11]:  List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients 
  Runs: [body.p.11.r.1]: "List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients "(italic)

[body.p.12]: Assisted Living facility that are participating in the older Adult waver may not  charge waver participants any additional fees such as entry fees, late payment fees,  etc. We do not charge Waiver participants any additional fees. Such as entry fees,  late payment fees etc.  
  Runs: [body.p.12.r.0]: "Assisted Living facility that are participating in the older "(bold) | [body.p.12.r.1]: "Adult"(bold) | [body.p.12.r.2]: " waver may not  charge waver participants any additional fees such as entry fees, late payment fees,  etc. We do not charge Waiver participants any additional fees. Such as entry fees,  late payment fees etc.  "(bold)

[body.p.13]: • Medicaid Subsidy: ____________________________ 

[body.p.14]: • State Subsidy: ________________________________ 

[body.p.15]: • Facility Subsidy: ______________________________ 

[body.p.16]: • TOTAL FEES: ________________________________ 

[body.p.17]: SERVICES 
  Runs: [body.p.17.r.0]: "SERVICES "(bold)

[body.p.18]: 5. In consideration of your monthly payment, the facility agrees to provide the following  services: 

[body.p.19]: a. A private/semi private room which includes a bed, bedside table lamp, chair, dresser;  bath linens and bed linens; 

[body.p.20]: b. Meals which include three meals a days and additional snacks 

[body.p.21]: c. Personal care services which include assistance with eating, personal hygiene,  transferring, toileting„ and dressing. 

[body.p.22]: d. Laundry and housekeeping services, 

[body.p.23]: e. Assistance with access to health care, social services, and social activities. f. Reminders or physical assistance to residents who can self-administer  medications/administration of medication. 

[body.p.24]: g. basic hygiene, grooming, bathing and oral hygiene, shaving equipment, lotions,  powders, deodorants, shampoo, comb/brush etc. 

[body.p.25]: OCCUPANCY PROVISIONS 
  Runs: [body.p.25.r.0]: "OCCUPANCY PROVISIONS "(bold)

[body.p.26]: . 

[body.p.27]: 6.You are assigned to bedroom #____________ and bed #_______________ 

[body.p.28]: 7.If it becomes necessary because of health, safety or other conditions to move your  bedroom or bed assignment, the facility will give you at least 5 days advanced notice. 

[body.p.29]: 8.If your care needs become greater than the facility can safely handle, it may become  necessary to transfer you to another facility. In that event, you will be given at least 30  days notice before the transfer and assistance with transmitting to your new home. 

[body.p.30]: 9.Locks are available for your use in securing personal belonging. 

[body.p.31]: 10.This facility follows security provisions to ensure your safety and well-being:

[body.p.32]:  List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients 
  Runs: [body.p.32.r.1]: "List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients "(italic)

[body.p.33]: • Alarmed entry and exits 

[body.p.34]: • Requirement to notify staff when leaving facility and length of absence • No locks on residents' room door. Door locks(inside and out) are required on all  residents rooms controlled by resident with staff access by permission or in case  of emergency.  

[body.p.35]: • Log for residents, staff and visitors to sign in/out facility. 

[body.p.36]: 11. Residents have full use of their own rooms and the common areas of the facility. 

[body.p.37]: 12. To ensure your safety and wellbeing, the staff has the right to enter your room;  however, the staff 

[body.p.38]: will make every effort to be respectful of your privacy and will always knock before  entering. 

[body.p.39]: 13. In the event you are on leave of absence from the facility for hospitalization,  vacation or other reason, the facility will hold your bed provided you are able to provide  payment for the duration of leave and the facility is eligible to meet the care needs of the  resident. The Medicaid waver program does not pay for bed hold services, that is  the sole responsibility of the resident. 
  Runs: [body.p.39.r.5]: "The Medicaid waver program does not pay for bed "(bold) | [body.p.39.r.6]: "hold services, that is  the sole responsibility of the resident. "(bold)

[body.p.40]: 14. In the event of an emergency situation which could make it unsafe or unhealthy to  continue to provide services at the facility, the facility will make arrangements to  temporarily relocate you to another location as directed by the Director of the facility, all  residents will be relocated to_________________________________________. 

[body.p.41]: 15. The resident rules of the facility are attached to this agreement and incorporated by  reference. By signing this agreement, you have indicated acknowledgement and receipt  of the resident rules and 

[body.p.42]: agree to abide by these rules. 

[body.p.43]: 16. The following special information is required in the untimely event of death: 

[body.p.44]: Burial Arrangements 
  Runs: [body.p.44.r.0]: "Burial Arrangements "(bold)

[body.p.45]: Financial____________________________________________________ Religious____________________________________________________ Person Who has burial responsibility: 

[body.p.46]: Name:____________________________ Relationship_________________ Address_______________________________________________________ ________________________________________________________

[body.p.47]:  List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients 
  Runs: [body.p.47.r.1]: "List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients "(italic)

[body.p.48]: Phone_________________________________________________________ 

[body.p.49]: ADMISSION & DISCHARGE POLICIES 
  Runs: [body.p.49.r.0]: "ADMISSION & DISCHARGE POLICIES "(bold)

[body.p.50]: 17. You may be discharged from the facility for the following reasons: • Non-payment of fees 

[body.p.51]: • Care needs exceed what the facility is able to provide 

[body.p.52]: • c Behavioral reasons, including but not limited to destruction of property,  violence, sexual misconduct, and not abiding by house rules. 

[body.p.53]: 18. in the event the facility decides to discharge you, you will be given at least 30 days  advanced notice prior to the date of discharge in the event you are discharged because of  health emergency, the facility may not be able to give you 30 days notice. 

[body.p.54]: 19. If you wish to leave the facility you are required to give 30day notice of date you  wish to terminate this agreement: However if you are leaving because of health  emergency 30day notice is not required. 

[body.p.55]: COMPLAINT AND GRIEVANCE PROCEDURES 
  Runs: [body.p.55.r.0]: "COMPLAINT AND GRIEVANCE PROCEDURES "(bold)

[body.p.56]: 20.A copy of resident's rights is attached and incorporated by reference into this  agreement. This facility will honor and respect your rights. 

[body.p.57]: 21.You have the right to make suggestions, register complaints or present grievances  about the care of service you or another resident receives here. You may address these  concerns ___________________. (____-_____-_______) Assisted living program  manager, or you may contact Assisted Living Complaint Unit at _____-___-____or tool  free at _-___-___-_______. 

[body.p.58]: 22.If your Complaint is directed to ALH manager, you will receive a response to your  complaint within 5 days If you are not satisfied with that response or the ALH manager  does not respond to your complaint, you may contact the Assisted Living Complaint  Unit. at ________________________ . 

[body.p.59]: 23.The facility is responsible for monitoring and recording residents health status. 24.The facility will not handle residents finances if resident is unable. 
  Runs: [body.p.59.r.1]: "not "(bold)

[body.p.60]: 25.The facility is responsible for arranging for or overseeing your care and for  contracting for services including equipment and supplies not provided by the facility. It 

[body.p.61]:  List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients 
  Runs: [body.p.61.r.1]: "List your ALF on ssMaps.com and get clients "(italic)

[body.p.62]: is the facilities responsibility to oversee the residents care and contract for services not  supplied by the facility. Case manager will assist waver participant to procure needs  medical supplies and medical equipment as authorized in their plan of care waver  participants may identify the assistive devices and equipment waver provider of their  choice through their case manager. 

[body.p.63]: 26.If for any reason you have not taken your personal property with you upon discharge,  the facility will pack up your belongings and safely store them for 20 days. If you or  your family have not retrieved them within 20 days of discharge, your property will be  disposed of. 

[body.p.64]: 27.Residents are not mandated to attend adult daycare. He or she has the right to choose  weather they want to attend. The facility will comply with the residents' plan of care  regarding the number the number per week of the attendance in the day care program. 

[body.p.65]: IN WHITNESS WHEREOF, THE PARTIES HAVE EXICUTED THIS  AGREEMENT 
  Runs: [body.p.65.r.0]: "IN WHITNESS WHEREOF, THE PARTIES HAVE EXICUTED THIS  AGREEMENT "(bold)

[body.p.66]: ON THIS_________ DAY OF_________ YEAR__________________ 

[body.p.67]: Whitness:___________________________ Facility:  

[body.p.68]: by:________________________________ 

[body.p.69]:  Signature 

[body.p.70]: Name:_____________________________ 

[body.p.71]:  Print 

[body.p.72]: Title:_______________________________ 

[body.p.73]: RESIDENT OR RESPONSIBLE PARTY 
  Runs: [body.p.73.r.0]: "RESIDENT OR RESPONSIBLE PARTY "(italic)

[body.p.74]: _________________________________________ 
  Runs: [body.p.74.r.0]: "_________________________________________ "(italic)

[body.p.75]: Signature 
  Runs: [body.p.75.r.0]: "Signature "(italic)

[body.p.76]: _________________________________________ 
  Runs: [body.p.76.r.0]: "_________________________________________ "(italic)

[body.p.77]: Date
  Runs: [body.p.77.r.0]: "Date"(italic)

function.arguments: {"answer":"The General Resident Agreement for Magnolia Gardens complies with KRS 194A.713(8). KRS 194A.713 requires that assisted living lease agreements include a minimum thirty (30) day move-out notice provision for resident nonpayment (subject to applicable landlord-tenant laws). The reviewed agreement lists non-payment of fees as a discharge reason (section 17) and provides for at least 30 days advanced notice prior to any discharge (section 18), with the sole exception for health emergencies (not nonpayment), and is a month-to-month lease, thus satisfying the requirement.","status":"completed"}

messages.content: The General Resident Agreement for Magnolia Gardens complies with KRS 194A.713(8). KRS 194A.713 requires that assisted living lease agreements include a minimum thirty (30) day move-out notice provision for resident nonpayment (subject to applicable landlord-tenant laws). The reviewed agreement lists non-payment of fees as a discharge reason (section 17) and provides for at least 30 days advanced notice prior to any discharge (section 18), with the sole exception for health emergencies (not nonpayment), and is a month-to-month lease, thus satisfying the requirement.
messages.name: final_answer
